/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=stringop-overflow -Wno-error=array-bounds -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wshadow -Wextra-semi -fno-rtti -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -march=native -mtune=generic -Wno-deprecated -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/mac_fapi_pusch_adaptor_test.dir/ul_pusch_pdu_test.cpp.o -o mac_fapi_pusch_adaptor_test  ../../../../../../lib/fapi_adaptor/mac/p7/pdu_translators/libocudu_mac_fapi_adaptors.a ../../../../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a ../../../../../../lib/fapi_adaptor/libocudu_fapi_uci_part2_tools.a -lgtest -lgtest_main libocudu_mac_translator_helpers.a ../../../../../../lib/fapi_adaptor/libocudu_fapi_precoding_matrix_tools.a ../../../../../../lib/ran/libocudu_ran.a ../../../../../../lib/support/math/libocudu_support_math.a ../../../../../../lib/ocuduvec/libocuduvec.a ../../../../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../../../../external/fmt/libfmt.a
